title: Test code coverage at 88.4%, some code paths untested
evidence: scores.json: test_coverage=0.884. defect_rate=1.0 confirms all tests pass, but 11.6% of code paths lack coverage.
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases such as empty-query returns, store load errors, and malformed CSV rows.

title: Maintainability score moderate at 0.588
evidence: scores.json: maintainability=0.5878787878787879. Large functions in store.go (LoadStore, loadExtended) and tools.go (BuildTools) concentrate logic.
suggestion: Extract shared CSV-to-Match conversion into a generic helper to reduce per-loader boilerplate.

title: Zero external dependencies — pure stdlib implementation
evidence: go.mod contains only module declaration and go 1.24 directive; no require directives. All 2688 lines use only encoding/csv, encoding/json, bufio, etc.
suggestion: No action needed — this is a positive quality: no supply-chain risk and minimal build time.
